title: main.tsx
content:
This file serves as the entry point for the React application. It sets up the root DOM element and renders the main `App` component within a `StrictMode`.

## Purpose

- Initializes the React application.
- Mounts the root `App` component to the DOM.
- Enforces `StrictMode` for development-time checks.

## Key Exports/Functions

- **`createRoot`**: From `react-dom/client`, used to create a root to manage the React tree in the DOM.
- **`document.getElementById("root")`**: Selects the HTML element with the ID 'root' where the application will be mounted.
- **`render`**: Method of the root object to render the React element tree.
- **`StrictMode`**: A tool for highlighting potential problems in an application. It activates additional checks and warnings for its descendants.
- **`App`**: The main component of the application, imported from `./App`.

## Usage

This file is automatically executed when the application is built and served. It does not typically require direct modification or import by other parts of the application.
